name: scorched-earth
description: A green light for Claude usage: know when to max out your weekly budget before it resets, plus a habit-based forecast that nudges you preemptively and a Course of Action layer that finds and runs high-impact work in your repos.

plugins.name: scorched-earth
plugins.description: Signals when remaining weekly Claude budget can only be spent by maxing out every remaining 5-hour window (unused weekly usage doesn't roll over). Adds a 🟢 statusline light, a 🔥 habit-based preemptive nudge, the `scorch` CLI, the `/scorched-earth` skill, and a DEFCON-ranked Course of Action layer (`/coa`, `/war-room`) that finds high-impact work in your linked repos and runs it under a leash.
